answer_excerpt:
Disability and Leave Services (DLS) is the right place to send your doctor's letter — they are the only team authorized to approve travel accommodations. Neither Amazon Travel & Events nor your manager can approve this.

Go to the DLS site to start your request and follow their process and requirements. They will determine what accommodation is appropriate for your situation.

Do not self-book premium economy before DLS approves it — the PEA program (which allows premium economy for 14+ hour flights) is based on trip frequency, not medical need, so it is a separate path from yours.
